title: selaginella macrostachya
intro: Selaginella macrostachya, also known as spikemoss or resurrection fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other secondary metabolites. The health benefits of Selaginella macrostachya include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
